detail.description: Exercises keep you strong. {{name}} is one of the best exercises to target your {{target}}. It will help you improve your mood and gain energy.

dynamicDescriptions.0: {{name}} focuses on your {{target}} and is a great choice when you want steady progress with controlled form.
dynamicDescriptions.1: Use {{name}} to challenge your {{target}} while building consistency. Keep your tempo smooth and your reps clean.
dynamicDescriptions.2: {{name}} combines {{equipment}} work with focused {{target}} activation, making it useful for balanced strength sessions.
dynamicDescriptions.3: For {{bodyPart}} development, {{name}} is a reliable option. Stay strict with technique and increase difficulty gradually.
